name: RevenueUniverse
description: Offerwall platform delivering rewarded offers and CPA campaigns for app publishers worldwide.

seo.title: RevenueUniverse — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: RevenueUniverse: Offerwall platform delivering rewarded offers and CPA campaigns for app publishers worldwide.

when_to_use: Offerwall CPA campaigns for global app publisher monetization
Rewarded offer placements for app user engagement
Supplementing ad revenue with task-based monetization SDK

pros: Rewarded offerwall for games and apps
cons: Brand visibility is low in 2026 market
review.verdict: Minor offerwall option worth testing as a tail source, not as a primary rewarded partner.
review.best_for: Indie apps adding a tail offerwall alongside Tapjoy, Adjoe, or AyeT.
review.not_for: Serious publishers needing top-tier offer quality and analytics.
